name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: You are as hopeless as any boys I have ever trained,” Ser Alliser Thorne announced when they had all assembled in the yard. “Your hands were made for manure shovels, not for swords, and if it were up to me, the lot of you would be set to herding swine. But last night I was told that Gueren is marching five new boys up the kingsroad. One or two may even be worth the price of piss. To make room for them, I have decided to pass eight of you on to the Lord Commander to do with as he will.” He called out the names one by one. “Toad. Stone Head. Aurochs. Lover. Pimple. Monkey. Ser Loon.” Last, he looked at Jon. “And the Bastard.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Ser Alliser一边辱骂全体学员，一边宣布为五名新人腾位，Jon等八人将交Lord Commander分配。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Alliser把晋升包装成‘为新人腾空间’，故意不给八人正面认可；最后单独说Bastard继续用身份伤口控制Jon的喜悦。
blocks.background_zh: **训练结束：** Alliser只决定recruit何时可swear vow；随后Lord Commander将其分配给rangers、builders或stewards。

blocks.original_text: Pyp let fly a whoop and thrust his sword into the air. Ser Alliser fixed him with a reptile stare. “They will call you men of Night’s Watch now, but you are bigger fools than the Mummer’s Monkey here if you believe that. You are boys still, green and stinking of summer, and when the winter comes you will die like flies.” And with that, Ser Alliser Thorne took his leave of them.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pyp欢呼后，Alliser警告他们仍是summer boys，winter来时会轻易死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: green and stinking of summer把缺乏冬季经验写成气味；‘毕业’不等于成熟，只是从训练风险进入真正风险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: The other boys gathered round the eight who had been named, laughing and cursing and offering congratulations. Halder smacked Toad on the butt with the flat of his sword and shouted, “Toad, of the Night’s Watch!” Yelling that a black brother needed a horse, Pyp leapt onto Grenn’s shoulders, and they tumbled to the ground, rolling and punching and hooting. Dareon dashed inside the armory and returned with a skin of sour red. As they passed the wine from hand to hand, grinning like fools, Jon noticed Samwell Tarly standing by himself beneath a bare dead tree in the corner of the yard. Jon offered him the skin. “A swallow of wine?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 众人嬉闹庆祝，Jon却注意Sam独站在枯树下，主动递酒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 庆祝圆圈与bare dead tree下的Sam形成空间对照；Jon的注意力第一次没有被自己的晋升完全占据。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Sam shook his head. “No thank you, Jon.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sam礼貌拒绝。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Alliser宣布Jon等八人结束训练，伙伴庆祝时Sam因被留下而独自离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Are you well?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon询问他是否还好。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Alliser宣布Jon等八人结束训练，伙伴庆祝时Sam因被留下而独自离场。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Very well, truly,” the fat boy lied. “I am so happy for you all.” His round face quivered as he forced a smile. “You will be First Ranger someday, just as your uncle was.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Sam强装高兴，祝Jon未来像Benjen一样成为First Ranger。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Sam强笑却用was谈Benjen，既无意触痛Jon，也显示Castle Black多数人已把失踪当死亡。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Is,” Jon corrected. He would not accept that Benjen Stark was dead. Before he could say more, Haider cried, “Here, you planning to drink that all yourself?” Pyp snatched the skin from his hand and danced away, laughing. While Grenn seized his arm, Pyp gave the skin a squeeze, and a thin stream of red squirted Jon in the face. Haider howled in protest at the waste of good wine. Jon sputtered and struggled. Matthar and Jeren climbed the wall and began pelting them all with snowballs.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon纠正Benjen仍‘是’First Ranger；伙伴们用酒和雪球打闹，欢乐淹没不安。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon只纠正一个时态，语法成为拒绝哀悼的防线；随即喧闹遮住两人的难受。
blocks.background_zh: **Benjen状态：** Benjen与ranging party失踪，尚未找到尸体或确认死亡；Jon坚持使用现在时。

blocks.original_text: By the time he wrenched free, with snow in his hair and wine stains on his surcoat, Samwell Tarly had gone.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon挣脱嬉闹时，Sam已经悄然离开。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 极短句把群体快乐的代价显出：Jon获得新阶段时，Sam从画面中消失。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: That night, Three-Finger Hobb cooked the boys a special meal to mark the occasion. When Jon arrived at the common hall, the Lord Steward himself led him to the bench near the fire. The older men clapped him on the arm in passing. The eight soon-to-be brothers feasted on rack of lamb baked in a crust of garlic and herbs, garnished with sprigs of mint, and surrounded by mashed yellow turnips swimming in butter. “From the Lord Commander’s own table,” Bowen Marsh told them. There were salads of spinach and chickpeas and turnip greens, and afterward bowls of iced blueberries and sweet cream.
blocks.explanation_zh: 晚餐以Lord Commander桌上的丰盛食物庆祝八人结束训练，older brothers也向Jon致意。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 丰盛menu和fire位置是institutional welcome，和Alliser辱骂式告别形成Night’s Watch内部两套文化。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Do you think they’ll keep us together?” Pyp wondered as they gorged themselves happily.
blocks.explanation_zh: Pyp边吃边问八人是否会继续在同一部门。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 庆功宴介绍rangers、builders分工与Watch衰退；Benjen话题令Jon失去胃口。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Toad made a face. “I hope not. I’m sick of looking at those ears of yours.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Toad开玩笑说早看腻Pyp的耳朵。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 庆功宴介绍rangers、builders分工与Watch衰退；Benjen话题令Jon失去胃口。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Ho,” said Pyp. “Listen to the crow call the raven black. You’re certain to be a ranger, Toad. They’ll want you as far from the castle as they can. If Mance Rayder attacks, lift your visor and show your face, and he’ll run off screaming.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pyp反嘲Toad长相能吓退Mance Rayder，因此必适合ranger。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow call the raven black是pot calling the kettle black的世界内变体，以同属黑鸟的反讽互相嘲笑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Everyone laughed but Grenn. “I hope I’m a ranger.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 众人笑时Grenn认真表示希望当ranger。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 庆功宴介绍rangers、builders分工与Watch衰退；Benjen话题令Jon失去胃口。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “You and everyone else,” said Matthar. Every man who wore the black walked the Wall, and every man was expected to take up steel in its defense, but the rangers were the true fighting heart of the Night’s Watch. It was they who dared ride beyond the Wall, sweeping through the haunted forest and the icy mountain heights west of the Shadow Tower, fighting wildlings and giants and monstrous snow bears.
blocks.explanation_zh: Matthar说人人都想；叙述解释rangers是越Wall侦察和战斗的核心。
blocks.literary_note_zh: boys想做ranger因其英雄叙事最显眼；叙述随后用builders与stewards纠正‘战斗才有价值’的单一尺度。
blocks.background_zh: **rangers：** 越过Wall侦察、巡逻、追踪wildlings并作战，是Watch最显眼的军事分支。

blocks.original_text: “Not everyone,” said Halder. “It’s the builders for me. What use would rangers be if the Wall fell down?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Halder选择builders，指出没有维护Wall就没有rangers的立足点。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 庆功宴介绍rangers、builders分工与Watch衰退；Benjen话题令Jon失去胃口。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: The order of builders provided the masons and carpenters to repair keeps and towers, the miners to dig tunnels and crush stone for roads and footpaths, the woodsmen to clear away new growth wherever the forest pressed too close to the Wall. Once, it was said, they had quarried immense blocks of ice from frozen lakes deep in the haunted forest, dragging them south on sledges so the Wall might be raised ever higher. Those days were centuries gone, however; now, it was all they could do to ride the Wall from Eastwatch to the Shadow Tower, watching for cracks or signs of melt and making what repairs they could.
blocks.explanation_zh: builders包括mason、carpenter、miner、woodsman；昔日增高Wall，如今只能巡检裂缝融化并尽力维修。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Once / now对比直接显示Watch衰退：过去能扩建巨墙，如今只能勉强巡检维护。
blocks.background_zh: **builders：** 维修Wall、castles、roads、tunnels并清理forest；人力衰退使其从扩建转为勉强保养。

blocks.original_text: “The Old Bear’s no fool,” Dareon observed. “You’re certain to be a builder, and Jon’s certain to be a ranger. He’s the best sword and the best rider among us, and his uncle was the First before he . . . ” His voice trailed off awkwardly as he realized what he had almost said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Dareon预测Halder当builder、Jon当ranger，却在提Benjen过去时尴尬住口。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Dareon话尾中断表明Benjen可能死亡已成社交禁区，伙伴知道Jon仍不能承受。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Benjen Stark is still First Ranger,” Jon Snow told him, toying with his bowl of blueberries. The rest might have given up all hope of his uncle’s safe return, but not him. He pushed away the berries, scarcely touched, and rose from the bench.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon坚持Benjen仍任First Ranger，因众人已放弃希望而失去胃口。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 未动blueberries把Benjen话题从抽象悲伤变成食欲消失的身体反应。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Aren’t you going to eat those?” Toad asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Toad问他是否不要blueberries。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon识别Sam恐惧，骑到kingsroad边缘考虑放弃宣誓，却选择返回Castle Black并形成行动计划。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “They’re yours.” Jon had hardly tasted Hobb’s great feast. “I could not eat another bite.” He took his cloak from its hook near the door and shouldered his way out.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon让给Toad，谎称吃饱后离席。
blocks.literary_note_zh: I could not eat another bite是保护性谎言；Jon不愿在欢乐桌上要求别人共同承担自己的忧虑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Pyp followed him. “Jon, what is it?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pyp追出来问发生了什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon识别Sam恐惧，骑到kingsroad边缘考虑放弃宣誓，却选择返回Castle Black并形成行动计划。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Sam,” he admitted. “He was not at table tonight.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon承认自己在担心Sam缺席。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon识别Sam恐惧，骑到kingsroad边缘考虑放弃宣誓，却选择返回Castle Black并形成行动计划。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “It’s not like him to miss a meal,” Pyp said thoughtfully. “Do you suppose he’s taken ill?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pyp也觉得Sam错过meal反常，猜测是否生病。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon识别Sam恐惧，骑到kingsroad边缘考虑放弃宣誓，却选择返回Castle Black并形成行动计划。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “He’s frightened. We’re leaving him.” He remembered the day he had left Winterfell, all the bittersweet farewells; Bran lying broken, Robb with snow in his hair, Arya raining kisses on him after he’d given her Needle. “Once we say our words, we’ll all have duties to attend to. Some of us may be sent away, to Eastwatch or the Shadow Tower. Sam will remain in training, with the likes of Rast and Cuger and these new boys who are coming up the kingsroad. Gods only know what they’ll be like, but you can bet Ser Alliser will send them against him, first chance he gets.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon判断Sam是怕八人宣誓后离开保护圈，独自面对Alliser、Rast及未知新学员。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他把自身离开Winterfell的记忆投射到Sam：理解不是凭空同情，而是知道被留下和失去保护关系是什么感觉。
blocks.background_zh: **宣誓后分散：** brothers可能留Castle Black，也可能调Eastwatch或Shadow Tower；Sam若未通过仍受Alliser训练。

blocks.original_text: Pyp made a grimace. “You did all you could.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Pyp安慰他们已经尽力。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon识别Sam恐惧，骑到kingsroad边缘考虑放弃宣誓，却选择返回Castle Black并形成行动计划。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “All we could wasn’t enough,” Jon said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon认为尽力却没有解决问题。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 一句话标志Jon从‘我们已经善良过’转向‘结果仍危险，所以必须换办法’。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: A deep restlessness was on him as he went back to Hardin’s Tower for Ghost. The direwolf walked beside him to the stables. Some of the more skittish horses kicked at their stalls and laid back their ears as they entered. Jon saddled his mare, mounted, and rode out from Castle Black, south across the moonlit night. Ghost raced ahead of him, flying over the ground, gone in the blink of an eye. Jon let him go. A wolf needed to hunt.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon焦躁地带Ghost骑出Castle Black；direwolf让马不安，随后独自去hunt。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 无目的骑行把restlessness转成身体运动；Ghost自由hunt与Jon即将失去离开自由形成对照。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: He had no destination in mind. He wanted only to ride. He followed the creek for a time, listening to the icy trickle of water over rock, then cut across the fields to the kingsroad.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon没有目的，只沿溪流和田野骑到kingsroad。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon识别Sam恐惧，骑到kingsroad边缘考虑放弃宣誓，却选择返回Castle Black并形成行动计划。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: It stretched out before him, narrow and stony and pocked with weeds, a road of no particular promise, yet the sight of it filled Jon Snow with a vast longing. Winterfell was down that road, and beyond it Riverrun and King’s Landing and the Eyrie and so many other places; Casterly Rock, the Isle of Faces, the red mountains of Dorne, the hundred islands of Braavos in the sea, the smoking ruins of old Valyria. All the places that Jon would never see. The world was down that road . . . and he was here.
blocks.explanation_zh: kingsroad让他渴望Winterfell与整个遥远世界，因为宣誓后这些地方都可能永远看不到。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 地名清单从near到far扩张世界，句末the world… and he was here突然收缩，呈现vow的机会成本。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Once he swore his vow, the Wall would be his home until he was old as Maester Aemon. “I have not sworn yet,” he muttered. He was no outlaw, bound to take the black or pay the penalty for his crimes. He had come here freely, and he might leave freely . . . until he said the words. He need only ride on, and he could leave it all behind. By the time the moon was full again, he would be back in Winterfell with his brothers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon意识到自己尚未swear，可自由骑回Winterfell与brothers团聚。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 他准确知道法律边界：words尚未说出口，因此选择仍真实存在；诱惑不是违反已立誓言。
blocks.background_zh: **vow边界：** recruit在正式说words前可自由离开；宣誓后擅离则成为deserter并可被处死。

blocks.original_text: Your half brothers, a voice inside reminded him. And Lady Stark, who will not welcome you. There was no place for him in Winterfell, no place in King’s Landing either. Even his own mother had not had a place for him. The thought of her made him sad. He wondered who she had been, what she had looked like, why his father had left her. Because she was a whore or an adulteress, fool. Something dark and dishonorable, or else why was Lord Eddard too ashamed to speak of her?
blocks.explanation_zh: 内心声音提醒那是half brothers、Catelyn不会欢迎他、未知mother也没有给他位置，并用羞耻猜测攻击自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 内心声音把事实、预期与侮辱混在一起：Catelyn不欢迎有经验依据，mother必不名誉则只是Jon以沉默填空的自伤推测。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Jon Snow turned away from the kingsroad to look behind him. The fires of Castle Black were hidden behind a hill, but the Wall was there, pale beneath the moon, vast and cold, running from horizon to horizon.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon转身看月下横贯地平线的Wall。
blocks.literary_note_zh: kingsroad代表多方向世界，Wall只有冷白横线；Jon的选择在两幅空间图像间完成。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: He wheeled his horse around and started for home.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他掉转马头，返回自己称作home的Castle Black。
blocks.literary_note_zh: home指代已悄然从Winterfell移向Castle Black；这不是说旧家不重要，而是他决定将归属建在选择之上。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Ghost returned as he crested a rise and saw the distant glow of lamplight from the Lord Commander’s Tower. The direwolf’s muzzle was red with blood as he trotted beside the horse. Jon found himself thinking of Samwell Tarly again on the ride back. By the time he reached the stables, he knew what he must do.
blocks.explanation_zh: Ghost带着猎物血迹归来；Jon继续想Sam，到stables时已有计划。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Ghost’s muzzle文本层丢失apostrophe已依页面修复；血迹说明wolf完成hunt，Jon也从漫游转入目标行动。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Maester Aemon’s apartments were in a stout wooden keep below the rookery. Aged and frail, the maester shared his chambers with two of the younger stewards, who tended to his needs and helped him in his duties. The brothers joked that he had been given the two ugliest men in the Night’s Watch; being blind, he was spared having to look at them. Clydas was short, bald, and chinless, with small pink eyes like a mole. Chett had a wen on his neck the size of a pigeon’s egg, and a face red with boils and pimples. Perhaps that was why he always seemed so angry.
blocks.explanation_zh: Maester Aemon因年老blind由Clydas和Chett协助；兄弟们以两人外貌开玩笑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Watch对Clydas、Chett外貌的笑话反映粗粝群体文化；外貌不等于能力，后文Chett也会展示具体steward知识。
blocks.background_zh: **Aemon household：** blind且高龄的Maester Aemon由stewards Clydas、Chett协助医疗、文书与日常生活。

blocks.original_text: It was Chett who answered Jon’s knock. “I need to speak to Maester Aemon,” Jon told him.
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett开门，Jon要求见Aemon。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “The maester is abed, as you should be. Come back on the morrow and maybe he’ll see you.” He began to shut the door.
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett说maester已睡，叫他明天再来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Jon jammed it open with his boot. “I need to speak to him now. The morning will be too late.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon用boot卡门，坚持morning太迟。
blocks.literary_note_zh: boot卡门是轻度强制，却被Jon限制在坚持见面，不升级为暴力；他用时间成本迫Chett重新评估。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Chett scowled. “The maester is not accustomed to being woken in the night. Do you know how old he is?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett责问他是否知道Aemon多老。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Old enough to treat visitors with more courtesy than you,” Jon said. “Give him my pardons. I would not disturb his rest if it were not important.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon反击Chett缺礼，向Aemon致歉并强调事情重要。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon以courtesy反击无礼，同时补上对真正受打扰者Aemon的道歉，显示他开始区分gatekeeper与decision-maker。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “And if I refuse?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett问若自己拒绝如何。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Jon had his boot wedged solidly in the door. “I can stand here all night if I must.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon说可以整夜卡在门口。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: The black brother made a disgusted noise and opened the door to admit him. “Wait in the library. There’s wood. Start a fire. I won’t have the maester catching a chill on account of you.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett嫌恶但让他进library生火，以免Aemon受寒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett嘴硬但实际认真照顾Aemon，避免把一个敌意人物写成纯粹无用。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Jon had the logs crackling merrily by the time Chett led in Maester Aemon. The old man was clad in his bed robe, but around his throat was the chain collar of his order. A maester did not remove it even to sleep. “The chair beside the fire would be pleasant,” he said when he felt the warmth on his face. When he was settled comfortably, Chett covered his legs with a fur and went to stand by the door.
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon穿bed robe却仍戴maester chain，在fire旁坐好，Chett给他盖fur。
blocks.literary_note_zh: bed robe与chain collar并置：身体休息，office identity不卸；chain在后文成为Jon论证核心。
blocks.background_zh: **maester chain：** 每种metal link代表一种学习领域；maester自行以study锻成chain，并终身佩戴作为service象征。

blocks.original_text: “I am sorry to have woken you, Maester,” Jon Snow said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon为深夜打扰道歉。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “You did not wake me,” Maester Aemon replied. “I find I need less sleep as I grow older, and I am grown very old. I often spend half the night with ghosts, remembering times fifty years past as if they were yesterday. The mystery of a midnight visitor is a welcome diversion. So tell me, Jon Snow, why have you come calling at this strange hour?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon说年老少眠，常与五十年前ghosts相伴，反而欢迎midnight mystery，邀请Jon说明来意。
blocks.literary_note_zh: ghosts与上一章Eddard旧梦遥相呼应；老年记忆在Aemon这里不是惊醒创伤，而是长期夜间陪伴。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “To ask that Samwell Tarly be taken from training and accepted as a brother of the Night’s Watch.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon请求让Sam结束训练并成为Night’s Watch brother。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “This is no concern of Maester Aemon,” Chett complained.
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett说此事与Aemon无关。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Our Lord Commander has given the training of recruits into the hands of Ser Alliser Thorne,” the maester said gently. “Only he may say when a boy is ready to swear his vow, as you surely know. Why then come to me?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon说明recruit readiness归Alliser判断，温和追问Jon为何来找自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Aemon不直接说无权，而让Jon说明为何找错权限链仍合理，像口试般迫他展示制度理解。
blocks.background_zh: **权限：** Alliser负责判断训练完成，Jeor Mormont作Lord Commander拥有最终组织权；Aemon主要靠counsel影响。

blocks.original_text: “The Lord Commander listens to you,” Jon told him. “And the wounded and the sick of the Night’s Watch are in your charge.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon指出Lord Commander听取Aemon意见，且Watch伤病者归他照管。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon提出两条路径：Aemon对Lord Commander有influence，且可把可预见伤害纳入medical responsibility。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “And is your friend Samwell wounded or sick?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon问Sam现在是否受伤或生病。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon深夜坚持见Aemon，请求Sam结束训练，以可预见伤害和Aemon制度影响力说明理由。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “He will be,” Jon promised, “unless you help.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon保证若不帮忙，Sam将会受伤。
blocks.literary_note_zh: He will be把future harm当作可预防事实；这也是推论，须由后续证据支撑。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: He told them all of it, even the part where he’d set Ghost at Rast’s throat. Maester Aemon listened silently, blind eyes fixed on the fire, but Chett’s face darkened with each word. “Without us to keep him safe, Sam will have no chance,” Jon finished. “He’s hopeless with a sword. My sister Arya could tear him apart, and she’s not yet ten. If Ser Alliser makes him fight, it’s only a matter of time before he’s hurt or killed.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon坦白Ghost威胁Rast等全部经过，说明他们离开后Sam会在训练中受重伤或死亡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 坦白Ghost威胁Rast会损害Jon自己，却增强陈述可信度；他没有把保护Sam美化成完全守规矩。
blocks.background_zh: **既往保护：** Jon曾组织学员避免重伤Sam，并让Ghost威胁Rast；这降低即时欺凌，却依赖Jon等人在场。

blocks.original_text: Chett could stand no more. “I’ve seen this fat boy in the common hall,” he said. “He is a pig, and a hopeless craven as well, if what you say is true.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett以体形与fear辱骂Sam是pig和craven。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett用pig/craven把身体、性格与价值绑在一起，为Aemon的反问提供待检验前提。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Maybe it is so,” Maester Aemon said. “Tell me, Chett, what would you have us do with such a boy?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon暂不反驳，反问Chett会如何处理这种boy。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Aemon没有立刻道德训斥，而让Chett把排斥逻辑说完整，方便Jon回应制度后果。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Leave him where he is,” Chett said. “The Wall is no place for the weak. Let him train until he is ready, no matter how many years that takes. Ser Alliser shall make a man of him or kill him, as the gods will.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett主张让Sam无限训练，认为Wall不容weak，Alliser要么把他变成man、要么让他死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: make a man or kill him把训练失败归为gods will，掩盖Alliser和制度主动制造的可避免危险。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “That’s stupid,” Jon said. He took a deep breath to gather his thoughts. “I remember once I asked Maester Luwin why he wore a chain around his throat.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon直斥愚蠢，深呼吸组织思路，开始讲Luwin解释maester chain的往事。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 深呼吸是论证转折：Jon压下即时怒骂，调用Luwin教给他的类比来争取听众。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Maester Aemon touched his own collar lightly, his bony, wrinkled finger stroking the heavy metal links. “Go on.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon触摸自己的metal links，示意继续。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett主张弱者被淘汰；Jon用maester chain说明组织需要多种能力，经反驳后锁定Sam可协助Aemon的具体角色。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “He told me that a maester’s collar is made of chain to remind him that he is sworn to serve,” Jon said, remembering. “I asked why each link was a different metal. A silver chain would look much finer with his grey robes, I said. Maester Luwin laughed. A maester forges his chain with study, he told me. The different metals are each a different kind of learning, gold for the study of money and accounts, silver for healing, iron for warcraft. And he said there were other meanings as well. The collar is supposed to remind a maester of the realm he serves, isn’t that so? Lords are gold and knights steel, but two links can’t make a chain. You also need silver and iron and lead, tin and copper and bronze and all the rest, and those are farmers and smiths and merchants and the like. A chain needs all sorts of metals, and a land needs all sorts of people.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon解释不同金属象征不同学问和不同社会成员；两枚links成不了chain，realm需要各种人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: chain隐喻同时解释knowledge diversity与social diversity；不同metal不是等级由低到高，而是缺一不能成链。
blocks.background_zh: **metal meanings：** 文中明确gold对应accounts、silver对应healing、iron对应warcraft；其他metal含义未在本段逐一说明。

blocks.original_text: Maester Aemon smiled. “And so?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon微笑追问结论。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett主张弱者被淘汰；Jon用maester chain说明组织需要多种能力，经反驳后锁定Sam可协助Aemon的具体角色。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “The Night’s Watch needs all sorts too. Why else have rangers and stewards and builders? Lord Randyll couldn’t make Sam a warrior, and Ser Alliser won’t either. You can’t hammer tin into iron, no matter how hard you beat it, but that doesn’t mean tin is useless. Why shouldn’t Sam be a steward?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon类推Night’s Watch也需要rangers、stewards、builders；Sam无法被打成warrior，却可像tin一样另有用途。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 不能把tin锤成iron反对单一男子气概模型；承认差异不等于判定tin低劣，而是寻找fit。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Chett gave an angry scowl. “I’m a steward. You think it’s easy work, fit for cowards? The order of stewards keeps the Watch alive. We hunt and farm, tend the horses, milk the cows, gather firewood, cook the meals. Who do you think makes your clothing? Who brings up supplies from the south? The stewards.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 身为steward的Chett愤怒，列出狩猎、耕种、养畜、木柴、烹饪、制衣和运输等维持Watch的艰苦工作。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett的反驳有效纠正Jon：steward不是给不勇敢者的轻松安置，而是庞大且需要具体技能的劳动系统。
blocks.background_zh: **stewards：** 不只是室内仆役，而负责food、animals、fuel、clothing、transport、ravens、records等整个后勤系统。

blocks.original_text: Maester Aemon was gentler. “Is your friend a hunter?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon先问Sam是否会hunting。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett主张弱者被淘汰；Jon用maester chain说明组织需要多种能力，经反驳后锁定Sam可协助Aemon的具体角色。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “He hates hunting,” Jon had to admit.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon承认Sam讨厌hunting。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett主张弱者被淘汰；Jon用maester chain说明组织需要多种能力，经反驳后锁定Sam可协助Aemon的具体角色。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Can he plow a field?” the maester asked. “Can he drive a wagon or sail a ship? Could he butcher a cow?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon继续问他能否plow、驾wagon、sail或butcher cow。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Aemon用连续实际任务测试漂亮类比，提醒‘多样性有价值’仍需证明person-role fit。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “No.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon回答都不会。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett主张弱者被淘汰；Jon用maester chain说明组织需要多种能力，经反驳后锁定Sam可协助Aemon的具体角色。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Chett gave a nasty laugh. “I’ve seen what happens to soft lordlings when they’re put to work. Set them to churning butter and their hands blister and bleed. Give them an axe to split logs, and they cut off their own foot.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Chett嘲笑soft lordlings做体力活会起泡流血甚至砍伤自己。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett的嘲笑夹带class resentment：lordling受过读写教育，却可能缺少Watch生存所需的日常劳动技能。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “I know one thing Sam could do better than anyone.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon说自己知道一件Sam比任何人都做得好的事。
blocks.literary_note_zh: one thing把论证从抽象同情转成comparative advantage，正是Aemon等待的答案。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Yes?” Maester Aemon prompted.
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon提示他说下去。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett主张弱者被淘汰；Jon用maester chain说明组织需要多种能力，经反驳后锁定Sam可协助Aemon的具体角色。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: Jon glanced warily at Chett, standing beside the door, his boils red and angry. “He could help you,” he said quickly. “He can do sums, and he knows how to read and write. I know Chett can’t read, and Clydas has weak eyes. Sam read every book in his father’s library. He’d be good with the ravens too. Animals seem to like him. Ghost took to him straight off. There’s a lot he could do, besides fighting. The Night’s Watch needs every man. Why kill one, to no end? Make use of him instead.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon谨慎看Chett后提出Sam可协助Aemon：识字、算术、读过大量书、善待animals和ravens，应被使用而非无意义杀死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jon不再只说Sam不能fight，而列出sums、literacy、books、ravens、animal affinity等positive capabilities。
blocks.background_zh: **role proposal：** Jon建议Sam利用贵族教育协助Aemon处理读写、算术、books和ravens，并非免除所有劳动。

blocks.original_text: Maester Aemon closed his eyes, and for a brief moment Jon was afraid that he had gone to sleep. Finally he said, “Maester Luwin taught you well, Jon Snow. Your mind is as deft as your blade, it would seem.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon沉思后称Luwin教得好，赞Jon心智与剑术同样敏捷。
blocks.literary_note_zh: deft as your blade把Jon渴望的warrior价值延伸到mind，证明他也不是只能被锤成单一metal。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “Does that mean . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jon急切问这是否表示同意。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Chett主张弱者被淘汰；Jon用maester chain说明组织需要多种能力，经反驳后锁定Sam可协助Aemon的具体角色。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。

blocks.original_text: “It means I shall think on what you have said,” the maester told him firmly. “And now, I believe I am ready to sleep. Chett, show our young brother to the door.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Aemon只承诺考虑，然后结束深夜会谈让Chett送客。
blocks.literary_note_zh: think on it不是承诺成功；Aemon保留审议权，也让Jon学会制度说服常以延迟决定结束。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Jon归属选择、Sam处境、Night’s Watch分工与制度内说服。
